name: stride-copilot-security-review
description: AI-powered security review for code changes via the security-review-essentials skill. Two scan modes (diff / --full) plus a considerations mode (--considerations <source>) that verifies a task's security_considerations were actually mitigated, seven framework rule packs (Android/Kotlin, Django/Python, Express/Node.js, iOS/Swift, Phoenix/Elixir, Rails/Ruby, React/Next.js) covering the full mobile + web + Node ecosystem with semantic-analysis vulnerability detection. Multi-platform CI/CD rule pack (8 platforms), Web defense-in-depth pack covering security headers (CSP/HSTS/X-Frame-Options/cookie flags), MAESTRO 7-layer agentic-AI classification with explicit non-AI mapping, RCI critique loop, baseline suppression, surgical-fix patches, SARIF v2.1.0 output for GitHub Code Scanning, --fail-on severity gating for CI, and --base <ref> for PR-against-base diffs. Ships a reference GitHub Actions workflow and a TAP 13 eval runner over 66 fixtures with positive-and-negative-control coverage. Loosely based on anthropics/claude-code-security-review.
